'''鈭歵h-zh-th''' ('''kathazhath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:stahp|stahp]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stahp|stahp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-zh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kathazhath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazhath|thithazhath]] || [[word:jithazhath|jithazhath]] || [[word:shithazhath|shithazhath]] || [[word:kithazhath|kithazhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthazhath|thuthuthazhath]] || [[word:jujuthazhath|jujuthazhath]] || [[word:shushuthazhath|shushuthazhath]] || [[word:kukuthazhath|kukuthazhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthazhath|thuthazhath]] || [[word:juthazhath|juthazhath]] || [[word:shuthazhath|shuthazhath]] || [[word:kuthazhath|kuthazhath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthazhath|thuthazhath]] || [[word:juthazhath|juthazhath]] || [[word:shuthazhath|shuthazhath]] || [[word:kuthazhath|kuthazhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethazhath|thethazhath]] || [[word:jethazhath|jethazhath]] || [[word:shethazhath|shethazhath]] || [[word:kethazhath|kethazhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothazhath|thothothazhath]] || [[word:jojothazhath|jojothazhath]] || [[word:shoshothazhath|shoshothazhath]] || [[word:kokothazhath|kokothazhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothazhath|thothazhath]] || [[word:jothazhath|jothazhath]] || [[word:shothazhath|shothazhath]] || [[word:kothazhath|kothazhath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothazhath|thothazhath]] || [[word:jothazhath|jothazhath]] || [[word:shothazhath|shothazhath]] || [[word:kothazhath|kothazhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thazhath|th忙thazhath]] || [[word:j忙thazhath|j忙thazhath]] || [[word:sh忙thazhath|sh忙thazhath]] || [[word:k忙thazhath|k忙thazhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathazhath|thathathazhath]] || [[word:jajathazhath|jajathazhath]] || [[word:shashathazhath|shashathazhath]] || [[word:kakathazhath|kakathazhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathazhath|thathazhath]] || [[word:jathazhath|jathazhath]] || [[word:shathazhath|shathazhath]] || [[word:kathazhath|kathazhath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathazhath|thathazhath]] || [[word:jathazhath|jathazhath]] || [[word:shathazhath|shathazhath]] || [[word:kathazhath|kathazhath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathazhath|shathazhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathazhath|goshathazhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathazhath|gokishathazhath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathazhathn眉|shathazhathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkn眉|goshathazhathnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazhathn眉|gokishathazhathn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathazhathsh毛|shathazhathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathazhathnksh毛|goshathazhathnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathazhathsh毛|gokishathazhathsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazhathro|shathazhathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkro|goshathazhathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazhathro|gokishathazhathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazhathmu|shathazhathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkmu|goshathazhathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazhathmu|gokishathazhathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathazhathsher|shathazhathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathazhathnksher|goshathazhathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathazhathsher|gokishathazhathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathazhathng|shathazhathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkng|goshathazhathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathazhathng|gokishathazhathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathazhathya|shathazhathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkya|goshathazhathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathazhathya|gokishathazhathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathazhathyam|shathazhathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkyam|goshathazhathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathazhathyam|gokishathazhathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazhathn眉sh毛|shathazhathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkn眉sh毛|goshathazhathnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazhathn眉sh毛|gokishathazhathn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazhathn眉ro|shathazhathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkn眉ro|goshathazhathnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazhathn眉ro|gokishathazhathn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazhathn眉mu|shathazhathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkn眉mu|goshathazhathnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazhathn眉mu|gokishathazhathn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazhathsh毛n眉|shathazhathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazhathnksh毛n眉|goshathazhathnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazhathsh毛n眉|gokishathazhathsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazhathsh毛ro|shathazhathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazhathnksh毛ro|goshathazhathnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazhathsh毛ro|gokishathazhathsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazhathsh毛mu|shathazhathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazhathnksh毛mu|goshathazhathnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazhathsh毛mu|gokishathazhathsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazhathron眉|shathazhathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkron眉|goshathazhathnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazhathron眉|gokishathazhathron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazhathrosh毛|shathazhathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkrosh毛|goshathazhathnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazhathrosh毛|gokishathazhathrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathazhathromu|shathazhathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkromu|goshathazhathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathazhathromu|gokishathazhathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathazhathmun眉|shathazhathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkmun眉|goshathazhathnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathazhathmun眉|gokishathazhathmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathazhathmush毛|shathazhathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkmush毛|goshathazhathnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathazhathmush毛|gokishathazhathmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathazhathmuro|shathazhathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathazhathnkmuro|goshathazhathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathazhathmuro|gokishathazhathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
